content.text:
[Chat messages since your last reply - for context] Assistant: 👋 Hi! I'm the Builderz assistant. Ask me anything about our blockchain development services, projects, or how we can help bring your Web3 ideas to life! User: Hi there. How are you doing today? Assistant:

Hey! I’m doing great, thanks for asking 😊
I can help with Builderz-related questions only—services, projects, Web3 development, timelines, pricing, and more.

What would you like to know about Builderz?

User: List name of your major services. Assistant:

Absolutely — our major services are:

  • Blockchain Apps
  • Smart Contracts
  • Design & Brand

If you want, I can also break these down into sub-services (DeFi, NFTs, token design, UI/UX, branding, etc.).

User: I'm asking about your major projects. Assistant:

Great question — our major projects include:

  • pump.science (Gamified Longevity Research Platform)
  • Reavers (NFT idle game)
  • Hashlings (Mint experience)
  • Zeta Mad Wars Competition (Leaderboard/xNFT experience for Zeta Markets)
  • Renaissance (NFT royalty redemption solution, Grizzlython winner)
  • TicketSensei (On-chain ticketing solution on Solana)

If you want, I can also share a 1–2 line breakdown of what we built in each one.

[Current message - respond to this] User: Hi, dear. How are you doing today?

I’m doing well, thank you 😊

I can help only with **Builderz-related** questions—services, projects, pricing, timelines, and Web3 development support.

What would you like to know about Builderz today?
